tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-background
tokens.description: Menu surface background. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-border
tokens.description: Menu border. Defaults to `1px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-focus-shadow
tokens.description: Focus ring applied to keyboard-focused items. Defaults to `0 0 0 2px var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-gap
tokens.description: Space between the optional icon and label. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-hover-background
tokens.description: Background used when an enabled item is hovered or focused. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-icon-background
tokens.description: Background used behind right-positioned icons. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-icon-border-color
tokens.description: Divider color used before right-positioned icons. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-icon-hover-background
tokens.description: Background used behind right-positioned icons when an enabled item is hovered or focused. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-item-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside each menu item. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny) var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-min-width
tokens.description: Minimum menu width. Defaults to `12rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-action-menu-shadow
tokens.description: Menu shadow. Defaults to `2px 2px 4px var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-avatar-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the image and initials fallback. Defaults to `50%`.

tokens.name: --esp-avatar-size
tokens.description: Width and height of the avatar. Automatically set by the `size` attribute.

tokens.name: --esp-badge-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the badge shell. Defaults to `999px`.

tokens.name: --esp-box-background
tokens.description: Adds a layer in the background of the box. Intended for background images or gradients.

tokens.name: --esp-box-background-opacity
tokens.description: The opacity of the background layer.

tokens.name: --esp-breadcrumb-color
tokens.description: The text color of the breadcrumb link.

tokens.name: --esp-breadcrumb-hover-color
tokens.description: The text color on hover.

tokens.name: --esp-breadcrumb-separator-color
tokens.description: Set the color of the separator. It defaults to the semantic heading color so navigation structure stays visible in light and dark themes.

tokens.name: --esp-button-group-divider
tokens.description: The border style between grouped buttons. Defaults to `1px dotted var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-button-incognito-padding
tokens.description: The padding for the incognito button style.

tokens.name: --esp-button-padding
tokens.description: The padding inside the button label and icon areas.

tokens.name: --esp-checkbox-focus-shadow
tokens.description: The color of the focus ring shadow. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-checkbox-icon-color
tokens.description: The stroke color of the checkbox icon. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-checkbox-size
tokens.description: The width and height of the checkbox icon. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-normal-to-medium)`.

tokens.name: --esp-color-box-background
tokens.description: The background color of the box.

tokens.name: --esp-color-burger
tokens.description: The color of the burger lines when closed.

tokens.name: --esp-color-burger-hover
tokens.description: The hover color of the burger lines when closed.

tokens.name: --esp-color-burger-opened
tokens.description: The color of the burger lines when open.

tokens.name: --esp-color-burger-opened-hover
tokens.description: The hover color of the burger lines when open.

tokens.name: --esp-color-dialog-bg
tokens.description: The background color of the dialog overlay.

tokens.name: --esp-color-picker-bg
tokens.description: The background color of the picker menu items.

tokens.name: --esp-color-picker-bg-alt
tokens.description: The alternate background color for picker menu items.

tokens.name: --esp-color-picker-bg-alt-hover
tokens.description: The hover background color of alternating picker menu items.

tokens.name: --esp-color-picker-bg-hover
tokens.description: The hover background color of regular picker menu items.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-background
tokens.description: The background color.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-border
tokens.description: The border color.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-indicator
tokens.description: The color of the open/close indicator.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-summary-background
tokens.description: The summary row background color.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-summary-background-active
tokens.description: The summary row background when the details element is open.

tokens.name: --esp-details-color-summary-hover-background
tokens.description: The summary row background on hover.

tokens.name: --esp-details-group-color-border
tokens.description: The border color of the group container.

tokens.name: --esp-details-size-padding
tokens.description: The padding inside the content area and summary row.

tokens.name: --esp-dialog-bg-opacity
tokens.description: The opacity of the dialog overlay background.

tokens.name: --esp-field-background
tokens.description: Background color of the shared field shell. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of the shared field shell. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-border-width
tokens.description: Border width of the shared field shell. Defaults to `1px`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-focus-bg
tokens.description: Focus background color of the shared field shell. Derived from `--esp-field-background`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-focus-shadow
tokens.description: Shadow color used for shared field focus treatment. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-hover-bg
tokens.description: Hover background color of the shared field shell. Derived from `--esp-field-background`.

tokens.name: --esp-field-text-color
tokens.description: Text color used inside the shared field shell. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-background
tokens.description: The background color of the panel. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-background)`.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-border
tokens.description: The border on the panel's leading edge. Defaults to the tear-off perforation, `1px dotted var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the panel's header and content regions. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-padding)`.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-radius
tokens.description: The radius of the panel's trailing corners. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-border-radius)`; the overlay drawer squares them.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-shadow
tokens.description: The panel's shadow. Defaults to `none` in the gutter/docked modes (the perforation does the separating) and to a drawer shadow in overlay mode.

tokens.name: --esp-flyout-z-index
tokens.description: Stack order of the overlay-drawer mode. Defaults to `3000` — above page chrome, below the dialog drop zone (4000). Set it on the `esp-page` (or an ancestor), not on the flyout itself: the page reads the same token to hoist the drawer's aside above its header.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-focus-outline
tokens.description: Marker focus-visible outline.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-gap
tokens.description: Gap between the stage and previews.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-marker-border
tokens.description: Focal marker border.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-marker-color
tokens.description: Focal marker fill.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-marker-shadow
tokens.description: Focal marker shadow.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-marker-size
tokens.description: Focal marker diameter.

tokens.name: --esp-focus-picker-stage-background
tokens.description: Empty/loading stage color.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background
tokens.description: Base footer color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-blend-mode
tokens.description: Decorative layer blend mode. Defaults to `normal`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-image
tokens.description: Decorative image or gradient layer. Defaults to `none`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-image-opacity
tokens.description: Decorative layer opacity. Defaults to `1`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-position
tokens.description: Decorative layer position. Defaults to `0 0`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-repeat
tokens.description: Decorative layer repeat behavior. Defaults to `repeat`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-background-size
tokens.description: Decorative layer size. Defaults to `auto`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-border
tokens.description: Block-start footer border. Defaults to `1px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-brand-logo-max-width
tokens.description: Configured logo maximum inline size. Defaults to `12rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-brand-logo-size
tokens.description: Configured logo block size. Defaults to `3rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-color
tokens.description: Body text color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-column-gap
tokens.description: Gap between link-group columns and major primary regions. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-padding-page)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-content-lead
tokens.description: Fraction of surplus placed before content (`0`, `0.5`, or `1`). Defaults to `0`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-content-max-width
tokens.description: Surface-alignment cap published by `esp-page`. Defaults to `100%`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-focus-outline
tokens.description: Focus-visible outline. Defaults to `2px solid var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-heading-color
tokens.description: Heading and configured-brand color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-link-color
tokens.description: Link color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-link-group-gap
tokens.description: Space between a link-group heading and its links. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-link-group-min-width
tokens.description: Intrinsic minimum link-group column width. Defaults to `10rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-link-hover-color
tokens.description: Hovered link color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-link-hover)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-padding-block
tokens.description: Content block padding. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-padding-page)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-padding-inline
tokens.description: Content inline padding. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-padding-page)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-row-gap
tokens.description: Vertical gap between footer grid rows and link groups stacked in `esp-footer-column`. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-big)`.

tokens.name: --esp-footer-section-gap
tokens.description: Gap between media, primary, and bottom regions. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-big)`.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-background
tokens.description: The background color of the visible error badge.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-color
tokens.description: The color of the visible error badge text.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-field-background
tokens.description: The background color applied to slotted fields while an error is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-field-border-color
tokens.description: The border color applied to slotted fields while an error is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-field-focus-shadow
tokens.description: The focus shadow color applied to slotted fields while an error is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-error-field-text-color
tokens.description: The text color applied to slotted fields while an error is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-font
tokens.description: The font family for the form item.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-font-size
tokens.description: The font size for the form item.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-hint-color
tokens.description: The color of the hint text. Defaults to a muted variant of the body text color.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-hint-font-size
tokens.description: The font size of the hint text. Defaults to `var(--esp-type-tiny)`.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-label-color
tokens.description: The color of the label text.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-background
tokens.description: The background color of the visible warning badge.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-color
tokens.description: The color of the visible warning badge text.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-field-background
tokens.description: The background color applied to slotted fields while a warning is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-field-border-color
tokens.description: The border color applied to slotted fields while a warning is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-field-focus-shadow
tokens.description: The focus shadow color applied to slotted fields while a warning is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-form-item-warning-field-text-color
tokens.description: The text color applied to slotted fields while a warning is shown.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-background
tokens.description: Background color of the grid container. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-border-inner
tokens.description: Border style of the grid's internal section separators. Defaults to `2px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-border-outer
tokens.description: Border style of the grid's outer edge. Defaults to `2px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-cell-border-color
tokens.description: Cell divider color used throughout the grid. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-header-active-background
tokens.description: Background color used for sorted or hovered sortable headers. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-header-background
tokens.description: Background color of header rows and pinned header cells. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-4)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-link-color
tokens.description: Link color used inside grid cells. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-link-hover-color
tokens.description: Link hover decoration color used inside grid cells. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-link-hover)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-row-background-even
tokens.description: Background color of even rows. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-row-background-odd
tokens.description: Background color of odd rows. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-row-hover-background
tokens.description: Background color of hovered rows. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-row-hover-border-color
tokens.description: Divider color used while rows are hovered. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-4)`.

tokens.name: --esp-grid-text-color
tokens.description: Text color used by the grid. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-background
tokens.description: The background color of the header bar. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-border
tokens.description: The border style of the header. Defaults to `solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-border-width
tokens.description: The border width of the header. Defaults to `0 0 1px 0`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-color
tokens.description: The configured brand text/logo color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-font-family
tokens.description: The configured brand font family. Defaults to `var(--esp-font-brand, var(--esp-font-headings))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-font-size
tokens.description: The configured brand text size. Defaults to `var(--esp-type-medium)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-font-weight
tokens.description: The configured brand font weight. Defaults to `var(--esp-font-weight-brand, var(--esp-font-weight-headings))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-gap
tokens.description: Space between a configured logo and brand text. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny-to-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-hover-background
tokens.description: The configured brand hover background. Defaults to `transparent`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-hover-color
tokens.description: The configured brand hover color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings-hover)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-hover-decoration
tokens.description: The configured brand hover text decoration. Defaults to `none`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-inline-placement
tokens.description: The CSS `justify-content` value for the brand container. Defaults to `start`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-logo-max-width
tokens.description: The configured logo maximum inline size. Defaults to `12rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-logo-size
tokens.description: The configured logo block size. Defaults to `calc(0.72 * var(--esp-header-height, calc(4.5 * var(--esp-size-small))))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-max-width
tokens.description: The maximum inline size of configured brand content. Defaults to `min(36ch, 45vw)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-padding-inline
tokens.description: Inline padding for the brand container. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-brand-placement
tokens.description: The CSS `place-content` value for the brand container. Defaults to `center`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-background
tokens.description: The background color of the button. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-background-hover
tokens.description: The background color of the button on hover. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-4)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-border-left
tokens.description: The left border of the button. Defaults to `1px dotted var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-box-shadow
tokens.description: The box shadow of the button. Defaults to `0px 0px 3px 0px var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-closed-color
tokens.description: The color of the burger button when the menu is closed. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-closed-hover-color
tokens.description: The hover color of the burger button when the menu is closed. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings-hover)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-color
tokens.description: The text and icon color of the button. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-open-color
tokens.description: The color of the burger button when the menu is open. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-open-hover-color
tokens.description: The hover color of the burger button when the menu is open. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings-hover)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-button-stroke-width
tokens.description: The stroke width of the burger button lines. Defaults to `0.45rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-color
tokens.description: The text/icon color inherited by header controls. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-compact-height
tokens.description: The height of compact scroll-reactive headers. Defaults to `max(44px, calc(3.5 * var(--esp-size-small)))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-content-lead
tokens.description: Surface-alignment contract set by `esp-page`: the fraction of the leftover width placed before the content, aligning it (`0` = start, `0.5` = center, `1` = end). Defaults to `0`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-content-max-width
tokens.description: Surface-alignment contract set by `esp-page`: the maximum width the bar content is constrained to (the bar background stays full-bleed). Defaults to `100%` (no constraint). `esp-page` sets this to its resolved content cap.

tokens.name: --esp-header-extended-menu-border
tokens.description: The border between the primary row and second-row menu in extended layouts. Defaults to `1px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-extended-menu-height
tokens.description: The second-row menu height for extended layouts. Defaults to `calc(3.5 * var(--esp-size-small))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-height
tokens.description: The height of the header bar. Defaults to `calc(4.5 * var(--esp-size-small))`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-progress-background
tokens.description: Background color of the optional scroll progress bar. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-progress-height
tokens.description: Height of the optional scroll progress bar. Defaults to `3px`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-progress-track-background
tokens.description: Track background of the optional scroll progress bar. Defaults to `transparent`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-scrolled-shadow
tokens.description: Box shadow used by elevated scroll headers. Defaults to `0 2px 8px var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-shadow
tokens.description: The box shadow of the header. Defaults to `0 0 2px var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-topbar-height
tokens.description: The maximum height reserved for the optional topbar row. Defaults to `8rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-transparent-background
tokens.description: Background used before scroll for transparent headers. Defaults to `transparent`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-transparent-color
tokens.description: Brand/action color used before scroll for transparent headers. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-header-z-index
tokens.description: The z-index of the header host. Defaults to `20`.

tokens.name: --esp-image-border
tokens.description: Border; defaults to `2px solid var(--esp-color-border)` or none in banner mode.

tokens.name: --esp-image-border-radius
tokens.description: Corner radius; defaults to `var(--esp-size-border-radius)` or zero in banner mode.

tokens.name: --esp-image-compact-width
tokens.description: Component-width threshold; defaults to `40rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-image-duotone-highlight-color
tokens.description: Duotone highlight stop; defaults to a light stop derived from the theme complementary.

tokens.name: --esp-image-duotone-shadow-color
tokens.description: Duotone shadow stop; defaults to a dark stop derived from the theme primary.

tokens.name: --esp-image-object-position
tokens.description: Final object-position override.

tokens.name: --esp-image-overlay-color
tokens.description: Overlay text color; defaults to the theme heading color when the banner polarity matches the scheme.

tokens.name: --esp-image-overlay-padding
tokens.description: Overlay content padding.

tokens.name: --esp-image-overlay-text-shadow
tokens.description: Overlay text shadow; defaults to a soft polarity-matched halo. Set to `none` to disable.

tokens.name: --esp-image-preview-border-color
tokens.description: The border color of the preview.

tokens.name: --esp-image-preview-overlay-text
tokens.description: The text color used by upload and failure overlays.

tokens.name: --esp-image-preview-remove-color
tokens.description: The text color of the remove button.

tokens.name: --esp-image-scrim-color
tokens.description: Scrim ink; defaults to the theme background when the banner polarity matches the scheme, else a polarity-pinned derivation.

tokens.name: --esp-image-scrim-opacity
tokens.description: Scrim-strength opacity override.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-blend-mode
tokens.description: Texture blend-mode override.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-color
tokens.description: Procedural texture ink; defaults to a theme-derived color following `banner-scheme`.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-image
tokens.description: Consumer-supplied texture background image.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-image-opacity
tokens.description: Consumer texture opacity.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-opacity
tokens.description: Procedural texture opacity override.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-position
tokens.description: Consumer texture position.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-repeat
tokens.description: Consumer texture repeat.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-scale
tokens.description: CSS-gradient texture pitch override.

tokens.name: --esp-image-texture-size
tokens.description: Consumer texture size.

tokens.name: --esp-image-upload-preview-background
tokens.description: The background color of the image preview area.

tokens.name: --esp-info-color-background
tokens.description: The background color of the info box.

tokens.name: --esp-info-color-border
tokens.description: The border color of the info box.

tokens.name: --esp-info-color-text
tokens.description: The text color of the info box

tokens.name: --esp-lightbox-bg
tokens.description: The background color of the lightbox overlay (falls through to --esp-vellum-background, then --esp-color-layer-3).

tokens.name: --esp-lightbox-bg-opacity
tokens.description: The opacity of the overlay background (falls through to --esp-vellum-opacity, default: 0.85).

tokens.name: --esp-menu-background
tokens.description: Background color of vertical and drawer menus.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of menu rails and drawers.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-drawer-shadow

tokens.name: --esp-menu-drawer-width
tokens.description: Drawer width. Defaults to `min(22rem, 86vw)`.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-background
tokens.description: Background color of the group header.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of the group.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-color
tokens.description: Text color of the group header.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-hover-background
tokens.description: Hover background color of the group header.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-background
tokens.description: Background color of the icon rail.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-min-width
tokens.description: Minimum width of the icon rail.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the icon rail.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-icon-size
tokens.description: Size of generated and slotted group icons.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-indicator-color
tokens.description: Color of the expand/collapse indicator.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-panel-background
tokens.description: Background color of horizontal disclosure panels.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-group-panel-shadow
tokens.description: Box shadow of horizontal disclosure panels.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-horizontal-justify-content
tokens.description: Main-axis alignment for horizontal menu items. Defaults to `flex-start`.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-active-background
tokens.description: Background color of the active item.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-active-color
tokens.description: Text color of the active item.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-active-font-weight
tokens.description: Font weight of the active item. Defaults to `var(--esp-font-weight-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-background
tokens.description: Background color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-border-color
tokens.description: Border color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-color
tokens.description: Text color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-hover-background
tokens.description: Hover background color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-hover-color
tokens.description: Hover text color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-background
tokens.description: Icon area background color.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-min-width
tokens.description: Minimum width of the icon rail.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the icon rail.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-icon-size
tokens.description: Size of generated and slotted item icons.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-item-padding
tokens.description: Padding around the item label.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-scrim-color
tokens.description: Scrim color when the drawer is open.

tokens.name: --esp-menu-top-offset
tokens.description: Top offset for drawers below fixed headers.

tokens.name: --esp-page-background
tokens.description: The background color of the page. Fills both the surface and the canvas gutters; the canvas tokens paint over it in the gutters only. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-background)`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-background-image
tokens.description: The background image to display behind page content. Defaults to `none`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-background-image-opacity
tokens.description: The opacity of the background image layer. Defaults to `1`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-canvas-background
tokens.description: The background color of the canvas gutters (the outer regions revealed when the viewport exceeds the cap). Defaults to `transparent`, so gutters match the page until styled and narrow viewports are unaffected.

tokens.name: --esp-page-canvas-background-image
tokens.description: A background image for the canvas gutters, mirroring the page background-image knob. Defaults to `none`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-canvas-background-image-opacity
tokens.description: The opacity of the canvas gutter image layer. Defaults to `1`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-fixed-header-offset
tokens.description: Offset reserved for fixed headers. Defaults to `var(--esp-header-height)`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-flyout-width
tokens.description: The width of the open flyout track (and of the `esp-flyout` overlay drawer). Defaults to `20rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-header-z-index
tokens.description: Z-index for fixed/sticky header regions. Defaults to `20`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-main-background
tokens.description: The background of the main content well. Defaults to `transparent` (the well shows the page background). Set it to give the content well its own card color, or pair the transparent default with `--esp-page-surface-shadow: none` for content that floats directly on the page with no frame.

tokens.name: --esp-page-max-width
tokens.description: The maximum width of the main content well. Set automatically by the `kind` attribute: `1536px` (wide), `768px` (narrow), or `none` (full). This cap now sizes the main grid track; surplus width beyond it becomes the canvas gutters.

tokens.name: --esp-page-sticky-header-top
tokens.description: Top inset for sticky headers. Defaults to `0`.

tokens.name: --esp-page-surface-border
tokens.description: An optional border on the inline edges of the surface, for themes preferring a hairline over a shadow. Defaults to `none` (e.g. `1px solid var(--esp-color-border)`). Combine with `--esp-page-surface-shadow: none` to switch the content frame from a drop shadow to a hairline, or turn both off for no frame.

tokens.name: --esp-page-surface-shadow
tokens.description: The box shadow drawn on the left and right edges of the content surface. On by default; casts into the gutters and is clipped away when the surface fills the viewport, so it only shows above the cap. Set to `none` to remove it.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of the track outline. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the track and fill. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-border-radius)`.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-circle-size
tokens.description: Diameter of the circular progress ring in circle mode. Automatically set by the `size` attribute.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-fill-color
tokens.description: Color of the progress fill. Defaults to the active action hue at the semantic muted lightness so the filled and unfilled portions remain distinguishable in light and dark themes.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-font-size
tokens.description: Font size for the value text. Defaults to `var(--esp-type-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-height
tokens.description: Height of the progress bar track. Automatically set by the `size` attribute.

tokens.name: --esp-progress-text-color
tokens.description: Color of the percentage text in both bar and circle modes. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-radio-button-focus-shadow
tokens.description: The color of the focus ring shadow. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-radio-button-icon-color
tokens.description: The stroke color of the radio icon. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-radio-button-size
tokens.description: The width and height of the radio icon. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-normal-to-medium)`.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-background
tokens.description: Background of the repeater container.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-border
tokens.description: Border of the repeater container.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the repeater container.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-content-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the virtualized content region. Defaults to `0`.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-gap
tokens.description: Space between repeated items.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-grid-column-gap
tokens.description: Horizontal gap between grid columns.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-grid-columns
tokens.description: Grid column count when `layout="grid"`. Supports media-query overrides.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-grid-row-gap
tokens.description: Vertical gap between grid rows.

tokens.name: --esp-repeater-padding
tokens.description: Padding used by repeater state panels and the loading/error footer.

tokens.name: --esp-search-active-background
tokens.description: Background color of the active result row. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-backdrop
tokens.description: Backdrop color behind the panel. Defaults to `oklch(0.15 0 0 / 0.6)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-border-color
tokens.description: Divider and loading-track color used by the search panel. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-highlight-background
tokens.description: Background color applied to `<mark>` highlights inside excerpts.

tokens.name: --esp-search-loading-indicator-color
tokens.description: Accent color of the loading spinner. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-primary)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-loading-indicator-track-color
tokens.description: Track color of the loading spinner. Defaults to `var(--esp-search-border-color)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-max-height
tokens.description: Maximum height of the results list. Defaults to `60vh`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-max-width
tokens.description: Maximum width of the search panel. Defaults to `40rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-muted-color
tokens.description: Muted text color for placeholders, excerpts, and empty states.

tokens.name: --esp-search-panel-background
tokens.description: Background color of the search panel. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-panel-shadow
tokens.description: Box shadow of the search panel.

tokens.name: --esp-search-text-color
tokens.description: Main text color used by the search UI. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-search-title-color
tokens.description: Title color for result rows. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-size-box-padding
tokens.description: The padding inside the box.

tokens.name: --esp-size-burger-stroke
tokens.description: The stroke width of the burger lines.

tokens.name: --esp-size-color-picker-border-width
tokens.description: The border width of the color picker.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-focus-shadow
tokens.description: Color of the focus ring shadow. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-thumb-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of the thumb. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-thumb-color
tokens.description: Fill color of the thumb. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-thumb-shadow
tokens.description: Box shadow of the thumb. Defaults to `0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-thumb-size
tokens.description: Diameter of the thumb. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-normal-to-medium)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-track-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the track. Defaults to `calc(var(--esp-slider-track-height, 6px) / 2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-track-color
tokens.description: Background color of the unfilled portion of the track. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-track-fill-color
tokens.description: Background color of the filled portion of the track. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-action-background)`.

tokens.name: --esp-slider-track-height
tokens.description: Height of the slider track. Defaults to `6px`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-focus-shadow
tokens.description: The color of the focus ring shadow. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-height
tokens.description: The height of the switch track. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-normal-to-medium)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-text-active-color
tokens.description: Text color of the active label in text mode. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-action-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-text-font-size
tokens.description: Font size for text-mode labels. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-font)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-text-highlight-color
tokens.description: Background color of the sliding highlight in text mode. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-action-background)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-text-inactive-color
tokens.description: Text color of the inactive label in text mode. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-text-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside each text-mode label cell. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny) var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-thumb-color
tokens.description: The thumb color. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-thumb-size
tokens.description: The diameter of the thumb. Defaults to `calc(var(--esp-switch-height) - 4px)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-track-color
tokens.description: The track background color when the switch is off. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-track-color-on
tokens.description: The track background color when the switch is on. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-action-background)`.

tokens.name: --esp-switch-width
tokens.description: The width of the switch track. Defaults to `calc(var(--esp-size-normal-to-medium) * 1.75)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-background
tokens.description: Background color of the overall component.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-border
tokens.description: Border color of the tab group container.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-button-active
tokens.description: Active tab button background.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-button-hover
tokens.description: Tab button hover background.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-strip-background
tokens.description: Background color of the tab strip.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-color-text
tokens.description: Text color for tab buttons.

tokens.name: --esp-tab-size-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the panel area.

tokens.name: --esp-toaster-gap
tokens.description: Gap between stacked toasts. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny-to-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-toaster-padding
tokens.description: Padding around the toaster container. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-padding)`.

tokens.name: --esp-toaster-z-index
tokens.description: Stack order of the toaster container. Defaults to `5000`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-background
tokens.description: Background color of the tooltip. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-border
tokens.description: Border of the tooltip. Defaults to `1px solid var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-border-radius
tokens.description: Border radius of the tooltip. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-border-radius)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-color
tokens.description: Text color inside the tooltip. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-text)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-focus-outline
tokens.description: Outline used when the trigger receives keyboard focus. Defaults to `2px solid var(--esp-color-link)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-font-size
tokens.description: Font size of tooltip text. Defaults to `var(--esp-type-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-max-width
tokens.description: Maximum width of the tooltip. Defaults to `40ch`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-padding
tokens.description: Padding inside the tooltip. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-tiny) var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tooltip-shadow
tokens.description: Box shadow for the tooltip. Defaults to `2px 2px 4px var(--esp-color-shadow)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-action-bg
tokens.description: Background color of the expand/collapse action rail. Defaults to a derived layer color.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-action-hover-bg
tokens.description: Hover background color of the expand/collapse action rail. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-action-size
tokens.description: Hit target size for tree icon actions. Defaults to `1.75rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-guide-color
tokens.description: Color of the branch guide path. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-hover-bg
tokens.description: Background color of a node row on hover. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-2)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-icon-color
tokens.description: Color of the expand/collapse action and node icons. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-headings)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-indent-step
tokens.description: Horizontal indent added per nesting level. Defaults to `1.25rem`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-node-padding
tokens.description: Vertical padding of each node row. Defaults to `var(--esp-size-small)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-row-bg
tokens.description: Background color of an unselected row. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-1)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-row-border-color
tokens.description: Border color of an unselected row. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-border)`.

tokens.name: --esp-tree-selected-bg
tokens.description: Background color of the selected node row. Defaults to `var(--esp-color-layer-3)`.

tokens.name: --esp-vellum-background
tokens.description: Shared overlay background hook consumed as a fallback by overlay components.

tokens.name: --esp-vellum-background-image
tokens.description: Optional repeating background image for the overlay (default: none).

tokens.name: --esp-vellum-background-image-opacity
tokens.description: Opacity of the background image layer (default: 0.3).
